summary: Backend testing of allocator.py and geometry.py for TN-Flow engine. All 31 tests pass covering exceptions, BHK filtering, proportional bisection, allocation geometry, wall thickness classification, NBC validation, and full pipeline (7 scenarios).
critical_code_review_comments: get_room_anchors() signature is (plot_facing, build_zone_polygon, session) — positional first arg is plot_facing, not keyword. Consistent with previous test file usage.
SpaceDeficitError on 12×20m 2BHK correctly triggers for Bedroom2 (clear < 7.5m²)
All 7 pipeline scenarios (4 facings for 2BHK, 3BHK_VILLA, 1BHK, 3BHK) pass NBC checks
context_for_next_testing_agent: allocator.py and geometry.py fully tested. Previous test file: /app/tn_flow_project/tests/test_tn_flow_engine.py (44/44 for constraint/vastu_router/exceptions). New test file: /app/tn_flow_project/tests/test_allocator_geometry.py (31/31). Note: get_room_anchors() takes positional args (plot_facing, build_zone_polygon, session).
